reviews.review_description: This is a very easy and beautiful coloring book. My favorite part is when the pictures move and come alive once they are colored in. My least favorite part is my inability to actually pic colors that look nice with each other. 😁 I’m seriously terrible at choosing complementary colors. It is fun to play randomly with odd color combinations. Sometimes I’ll just color everything in black, so just the outlines show. So many possibilities, too many! I look forward to new scenes being available!

I didn’t realize how much empty space I was leaving in each section until I widened my boundaries and noticed the areas I had missed because I couldn’t see them. I think it would be helpful if you could add a feature that allows us to see everything that can be painted. A good example of this is the robot activity, where you need to color the robot's feet in order for it to move. As the robot moves, you can color in the areas you missed. 

Additionally, I want to address a boundary glitch. No matter what I do, I can’t reset the boundary anymore. Because I can't reset the boundary, I am unable to paint the spaces that still need to be filled.  other than that, it’s a very good game. I just wish I could see the spaces that I’m missing. ￼

I was blown away by this app!  Is much better than i anticipated!  It’s very relaxing and easy to use.  The controls are well thought out and intuitive.

Worth every penny!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your fantastic review!

reviews.review_description: This is a nice, quiet relaxing game. That being said was the last update 4 years ago? Could we please get some new pictures?!
my controllers work fine on everything else but this game won't let me do anything

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry you’re having this issue. It’s very likely related to the version of quest firmware on your headset, and not our game. Can you try to make sure that you have the latest version of firmware?

Here are the instructions to do that: https://www.meta.com/help/quest/540602136930952/?srsltid=AfmBOoolfIzPrn_Dq2BHuXx0qxnfxtudpBQ3wsHIiWERQQLjEfpE7lE6

reviews.review_description:
Nice stress relief.  My grand daughter enjoys it also.  Very pretty.   
Will there be more worlds to come?  A cartoon one would be fun. 🤪
It would be nice if maybe there was a way to split some areas smaller for even more coloring variety? 
Love your work

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, glad you and your granddaughter enjoyed it! And thanks for your valuable feedback!

reviews.review_description: This is very relaxing. Just purchased it. It's gorgeous. When you color it in, it comes alive.  It's relaxing. The tutorial is easy to understand.  You can use it sitting or standing.  Make sure you turn around and paint behind you.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your wonderful review!

reviews.review_description:
In the first picture you are told to use the eye dropper to pick the color from the ladybug but there isn’t any direction for finding the eye dropper. Only a pointer and a palette are available.

Update: after restarting my headset and the app the right hand controller allowed B button to be the eye dropper. It would be great if in the tutorial there was an image of what buttons do what since the right hand controller is basically invisible with just the pointer color showing.
Kudos to the developer or whoever responded for quickly trying to help.

developer_response.body: The eyedropper is one of the buttons on the controller – – there is a visual example of it in that first tutorial lesson. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: I surprised myself by really enjoying this VR experience. The animations added a wonderful dimension to the colouring activities.  I have now completed all of the fantastic, storytelling images and I really hope that the developers have plans to add more.  I’d definitely buy any expansions!
I absolutely love this game. I just wish there were more pictures to color.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much — we’re so glad you like it!

reviews.review_description: It's a very nice colouring app, but the picture doesn't take long to complete. I was disappointed that you couldn't stroll around the environment, colouring as you go. That would be the cherry and worth a full star rating.

I love coloring books and have often used them to relax an escape the issues of the world. Now just imagine literally stepping into a coloring book and creating a world that comes alive one stroke at a time (point and click)! You know what I mean! 😊 I don’t have enough words to express how much I love this app! It’s easy to forget life exists outside of this amazing app! GET IT!! I’m 60 and I’m loving it!!

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for your wonderful review. We are so happy that you’re enjoying it. Color on!

reviews.review_description: You are literally in a moving coloring book! It’s so relaxing. I have spent hours just letting my creativity flow. Feel distressed and relaxed. Love seeing the progress come to life and reveal a new element to be colored as you paint. Great app!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your fantastic review -- we're so glad you're enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: My 6 year old has colored erased and recolored every page! Update this thing! It's wonderful but I'm about to get rid of it if you have nothing new

reviews.review_title: Beautiful but know what you're buying
reviews.review_description:
In a gist, this is like walking into a VR coloring book world. Everything is in black and white around you. You cannot move around. You are stationary. But its almost God-like as you look at the world around you and begin to paint it to your own liking. 

So basically, its like having a laser pointer in a virtual world. You choose the color, point at what you want to color and like a paint bucket tool, it fills that part. 

The cool aspect of this though is that things are animated. Sometimes when you color something, it comes to life and flies over your head. Or a flower may blossom, unveiling more to color. Color a bird house and bird flies over to live in it. Neat little things like that.

This is a game to play when you are not looking for action or challenge. This is a slow (zen) peaceful place to escape to. Like God allowed you into the Garden of Eden and you are the creator.

It's a great concept, but the novelty of filling in broad patches of color quickly wears off for likely anyone beyond the age of children. That's not to say I haven't enjoyed my time so far. But it's not an app I see myself going back to every week, unless...

Dear devs, can you please, as other reviewers have intimated, add a marker/crayon/paintbrush tool, in addition to the paint-fill. I would love to see and experience my own brush strokes within the worlds you have created, and would make this feel more like an actual coloring book. I think that would make this a 5 star app. As of now the coloring experience is too automated. Thank you. 

Also, in a few of the scenes I have tried, the sky is far too light and bright for the color I have chosen for it. It would be better, in my opinion, if the program did not autobrighten colors, and allowed for a truer representation. Let me have a dark sky!

Unfortunately a very disappointing app to me. I was expecting a proper colouring book where you get the meditative feeling using a brush or a colouring pencil can give you. Nothing like that here. You point and click and the colours are neatly filled in for you. Where is the sense of creativity in that?

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, and sorry it wasn't for you! We've got some awesome new scenes in the pipeline that give you quite a bit of creative control -- we'd love to hear what you think.  Thanks again.

reviews.review_description: This app is lovely, the way the scenes come alive as you continue to add colour is amazing. It’s a very peaceful app and I wish there were more scenes because I think I finished everyone of them in one day LOL. The good news is you can wipe them all clean and start all over again. I imagine VR colouring would be wonderful for someone who is in the hospital…lonely and sad. I also imagine it would be a good way to forget about pain even for a moment. I use this app And others and like apps to decompress from my days and it is wonderful.
Ok, I originally got this game for my daughter, but seriously play it more then she does.  It’s so relaxing and peaceful.  I LOVE this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we're so glad you and your daughter are enjoying it! Stay tuned for more awesome chapters in a few weeks!

reviews.review_description: I wish I could share this experience with the world right now. I felt like I completely stepped out of our world and away from all of the fear and sadness and uncertainty, if only for a few minutes. It is beautifully magical. Thank you! I need about 1000 more pages though!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful words! We are so glad you enjoyed it. Don’t worry – – more scenes coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
I only wish there were more scenes to color! I LOVE the peaceful settings and how they all link together. 
Please make more!

developer_response.body: We've got more scenes to color, coming next week (free).  We hope you like!

reviews.review_description: Easy simple colouring game loads if pictures to colour hope they add more. Great how the pictures start to move and come to life when you colour. Great depth to the pictures to. For this price it's well worth it

I love to color/paint by number, so this was one of my first purchases on the Oculus.  Just a simple, relaxing app.  And the images start to animate as you color them!  So cool!  I can't wait for more content!

developer_response.body: We’re so glad you are enjoying Color Space! We’ve got some amazing news svrnes coming in a few weeks.

reviews.review_description: I'm a successful 43 Yr old male, with a v busy schedule but gave this a go as on sale. No regrets at all. It's so relaxing and I now get why the paper colouring books have been do popular. The great thing about being on vr is that the colourings come to life, you can easily change colours and undo, it's just a shame there's not more content but I k ow they've already released some free dlc, so I e no doubt there will be more in the future. Buy this game :)

I was about an hour into coloring when I made the mistake of asking my wife to check out my work.  It's now been at least another hour and she won't give it up. Great!  ;)

As someone who loved coloring as a kid and continues to love it as an adult, this is a fantastic VR escape.  As someone who has a degree of color-blindness, having the palette name each color when it's being pointed at with the "brush" would be extremely helpful.  With that additional aid, this game is a clear 10.
Incredible as you see the world around you come to color.￼

developer_response.body: Thank you, we’re so glad you’re enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: This app is a great way to escape and relax. Whish there were more to color.

Tranquil music mixed with enough animation for a relaxing & calming mood. Looking forward to another launch of another project from this team! If it is t in the works then here’s the first vote for a forward movement to a yes!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we're delighted you enjoy it and appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
It’s awsome and amazing but I hate it when I’m trying to press something and it changes the 
color in the scenes with out me wanting it
Love this one u can do so much and it’s so calming

New to the game but so far I love it. I got it to get my wife in to playing on the occulus but I find the game relaxing. Hoping there will be multiple update for different books to come. Thank you for all your hard work in creating this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much Jeff, we really appreciate the kind words and are glad you’re enjoying it. Make sure to give your wife a turn too!  More to come soon!

reviews.review_description: I love how there is so many different colors, and shades of color. I also love how the pictures come to life as u color them. Im so happy I purchased this coloring book.
Awesome stuff

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so glad you enjoyed it. Stay tuned for a big new pack of scenes coming in a few weeks.

reviews.review_description: The “pages” are fun and coloring things in feels so satisfying.
I love it and think it is perfect

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re so glad you’re enjoying it! Have to shout out to our amazing artists and sound designers for making it a great experience.

reviews.review_description:
This is an ultimate chill. I love the experience of just choosing colours and seeing the scene wake up. 

I hope the devs continue to expand on it with new scenes. 

Thanks for creating something so unique.
cause i have not played the game yet but it sounds great plus i have a feeling it will be great plus i love coloring

reviews.review_title: So I love this.. but it’s disappointing!
reviews.review_description:
Only thing is I wish it had more pages to do.. I went thru the whole thing in about an hour.. it was super disappointing... I feel like they should have a way to download new pages and remove others.. I’d even pay a little extra for the option to have more pages more often..    cause even if they update weekly it feel like a waste of money ya know.. it’s like when u buy 
a video game and beat it in a day... well what now.. lol and maybe have an option to change the music..  but it is a lot of fun

developer_response.body: Thank you! Tune in next week for a new book of scenes, we think you'll like it!

reviews.review_description: Color space gives me motion sickness for some reason but beat saber does not. The experience beyond motion sickness is really good. More picture options would be great!

I absolutely love this game! I love how as you color animation starts. I wish there was more options; however, I’ve already colored everything! Add more content and you’d get five stars. UPDATE: They added more content, so they get five stars!!
